name: Media Bar
author: grimmdev
description: A featured content slideshow bar on the Jellyfin home page. Showcases backdrop images, logos, ratings, genres, and plot summaries for your media with auto-advancing slides, navigation arrows, and play/detail/favourite buttons. Configure a playlist ID for curated content or let it pick from your latest additions automatically.

vars.name: Playlist ID
vars.description: Jellyfin item ID of a playlist to use as the source for the bar. Leave blank to use the latest additions from your library.

vars.name: Manual Item IDs
vars.description: Comma-separated list of Jellyfin item IDs to feature. Ignored if Playlist ID is set.

vars.name: Number of Items
vars.description: How many items to show in the bar (1–20).

vars.name: Slide Interval (ms)
vars.description: How long each slide is shown before auto-advancing. Default is 8000 (8 seconds).

vars.name: Shuffle Items
vars.description: Randomise the order of items each time the bar loads.
